headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Drops As Trump's War Comments Hit Stocks; Oil Surges (Live Coverage)
summary: The Dow Jones index fell Thursday as Trump warned Iran to "get serious soon" about a peace deal. Oil prices surged.

headline: Cisco Expands AI Agentic Security Portfolio: Will the Tech Deliver?
summary: CSCO gears up for an AI-agent workforce with new identity and security tools, even as security revenue declines and competition intensifies.

headline: Dow opens up but Nasdaq falls as oil surges, Trump says Iran 'better get serious'
summary: 10am: Stocks open mixed, Cisco and IBM lead Dow higher US stocks have opened mixed, with early losses quickly pared. The Nasdaq is down 0.7%, but the Dow Jones is now up 0.2% after starting down, with the S&P 500 in the middle, down 0.35%. Biggest Dow fallers are Nvidia, down 1.6%,...
